text: abdur.ai v1 wired — Next.js + MDX, Clay design locked, /aitldr feed live.
Mnemix Beacon spec locked — six named signals, multiplicative floors, S1–S7 decomposition.
Postmortem published: a 75% false-close rate on twelve verified safety gates. P-008 through P-012 committed to MOLL.
Signal Noir v2 live across the Mnemix landing, docs, and UI primitives.
Orchestrator now pushes one intent to Claude Code, Codex, and Aider in parallel, then reconciles the diffs.
dockerfile.ai proved sandbox build verification end-to-end — three for three on the eval repos.
brew install mnemix-ai/tap/mnemix — the CLI is one command away now.
Cuéntame backend plus the outbound voice loop wired on a strict ten-minute cap.
